title: राधा मङ्गलाष्टकम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री राधा मङ्गलाष्टकम् ॥

वृन्दावनविहारिण्यै कृष्णप्राणप्रियायै च।
गोपिकानां शिरोरत्नायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ १॥

वृषभानुसुतायै नित्यं कीर्तिमत्यै सुशोभनायै।
कुङ्कुमाङ्कितभालायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ २॥

चन्द्रावलीसमायुक्तायै ललितासखिसेवितायै।
विशाखापरिसंयुक्तायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ ३॥

रासमण्डलमध्यस्थायै नृत्यगीतविशारदायै।
वंशीध्वनिसुमोहितायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ ४॥

यमुनातीरकुञ्जेषु लीलाविलासचतुरायै।
नूपुरध्वनिमण्डितायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ ५॥

कृष्णमानसमोहिन्यै प्रेमनिधिस्वरूपिण्यै।
भक्तवत्सलरूपायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ ६॥

त्रैलोक्यसुन्दर्यै नित्यं सच्चिदानन्दरूपिण्यै।
महालक्ष्मीस्वरूपायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ ७॥

सर्वसौभाग्यदात्र्यै च प्रेमभक्तिप्रदायिन्यै।
परमानन्दरूपायै श्रीराधायै मङ्गलम्॥ ८॥

राधामङ्गलकं स्तोत्रमिदं यः पठति प्रभाते।
सर्वमङ्गलसम्प्राप्तिं राधाकृपां च विन्दति॥

॥ इति श्री राधा मङ्गलाष्टकम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Radha Mangalashtakam ||

Vrindavana Viharinyai Krishnaprana Priyayai Cha |
Gopikanam Shiroratnayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 1 ||

Vrishabhanusutayai Nityam Kirtimatyai Sushobhanayai |
Kunkumankita Bhalayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 2 ||

Chandravali Samayuktayai Lalitasakhi Sevitayai |
Vishakhapari Sanyuktayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 3 ||

Rasamandala Madhyasthayai Nrityageetavisharadayai |
Vamshidhvani Sumohitayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 4 ||

Yamunatirakunjashu Lilavilasachaturayai |
Nupuradhvani Manditayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 5 ||

Krishnamanasa Mohinyai Premanidhi Svarupinyai |
Bhaktavatsala Rupayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 6 ||

Trailokyasundaryai Nityam Sachchidananda Rupinyai |
Mahalakshmi Svarupayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 7 ||

Sarvasaubhagya Datryai Cha Premabhakti Pradayinyai |
Paramananda Rupayai Shri Radhayai Mangalam || 8 ||

Radhamangalakam Stotram Idam Yah Pathati Prabhate |
Sarvamangala Sampaptim Radhakripam Cha Vindati ||

|| Iti Shri Radha Mangalashtakam Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
वृन्दावनविहारिणी, कृष्णप्राणप्रिया, गोपिकाओं की शिरोरत्न श्रीराधा को मंगल।

वृषभानु की पुत्री, कीर्तिमती, कुंकुमअंकित ललाट वाली श्रीराधा को मंगल।

रासमण्डल में विराजमान, नृत्य-गीत में विशारद, वंशीध्वनि से मोहित राधा को मंगल।

त्रैलोक्य-सुन्दरी, सच्चिदानन्दरूपिणी, महालक्ष्मी स्वरूप राधा को मंगल।

सर्वसौभाग्यदात्री, प्रेमभक्तिप्रदायिनी, परमानन्दरूपा राधा को मंगल।
benefits: Eight auspicious verses invoking blessings of Shri Radha
Invokes the blessing of divine love and prema-bhakti
Ideal morning recitation for Radha devotees
Powerful for Radha Ashtami and Holi celebrations
description: The Radha Mangalashtakam, known in Sanskrit as राधा मङ्गलाष्टकम्, is an eight-verse devotional hymn in praise of Goddess Radha. This sacred composition is sourced from Brahmavaivarta Purana and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Devotees recite this prayer to grant all forms of auspiciousness (sarva-mangala) and bestow divine love and prema-bhakti. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Wednesday (Budhvar) and Friday (Shukravar) and during Radha Ashtami, Holi, and Sharad Purnima. At 8 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 3 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Radha Mangalashtakam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Radha Mangalashtakam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Eight auspicious verses for Shri Radha's blessings and divine love.
